message:
test(scheduler,extension_replay): add 38 tests for public API coverage gaps

scheduler.rs (74→94): batch enqueue ordering, time_until_next_timer positive
case, DeterministicClock::set, ReactorMesh per-shard queries, drain_shard
out-of-range, ReactorPlacementManifest edge cases (zero shards, as_json,
single-node/empty-topology fallbacks), all fallback reason variant codes,
NumaSlabPool lifecycle, telemetry JSON shape, Seq/timer count tracking.

extension_replay.rs (41→59): ReplayRecorder event capture, lane metadata
propagation, cancel/retry lifecycle, budget gating, finish_and_compare
divergence detection, multi-extension interleaving, ReplayLaneConfig/Result
serde roundtrip, compare_replay_bundles standalone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
